title: Big Chilling only for the Power in your name
description: An image-centered artifact pairing a playful, power-in-the-name title with a photographed abstract pencil drawing on folded paper, laid over printed text.

motifMap.meaning: The title frames naming as a charged or playful source of force before the image supplies a nonverbal body.
The drawing gathers face-like, creature-like, and patterned marks into a visual language that resists literal reading.
The image layers handmade mark-making over an already printed page, turning ordinary reading material into a field for translation and interruption.

excerpt: Big Chilling only for the Power in your name

associatedMedia.description: Primary Substack image post: a photographed abstract pencil drawing on folded paper, laid over printed text, with a fragmented creature- or face-like form and patterned interior sections.
associatedMedia.altText: A folded sheet of paper with an abstract pencil drawing, partly creature-like or face-like, photographed on top of printed text.

editHistory.notes: Manual live RSS extraction performed with user permission. Classified from the actual image post as Trickster Prophet with Fractured Translation and Adaptive Witness because the artifact translates a charged title into an abstract visual language of folded paper, layered text, and creature-like marks while preserving ambiguity rather than explaining it.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-07-14.big-chilling-only-for-the-power-in.phase-trickster-prophet.variant-fractured-translation.subcurrent-adaptive-witness.metadata.v2.6.5.json.
